languages.text: "Диодас, ты влез в голову моей дочери, словно отродье бездны! Ты прикрываешься Его именем, но идешь против Его заветов. Болваны, подобные тебе, лишь выжигают ростки знаний, что могли бы послужить на благо Человечества. Ликуй, инквизитор: мое наследие уничтожено. Но ты не получишь от меня раскаяния, ибо правда на моей стороне".

"Diodas, like a spawn of the abyss have you poisoned my daughter's mind! You cloak yourself in His name, but you go against His covenants. Fools like you only burn away the shoots of knowledge that could serve the good of Humanity. Revel in your triumph, Inquisitor: my legacy is destroyed. But you will hear no contrition from me, for the truth is on my side."
languages.original_text: "Диодас, ты влез в голову моей дочери, словно отродье бездны! Ты прикрываешься Его именем, но идешь против Его заветов. Но ты не получишь от меня раскаяния, ибо правда на моей стороне".

languages.text: “狄奥达斯，你这个深渊孽种，竟然毒害我女儿的思想！你用着祂的名义，却违背祂的圣约。你这等蠢货，只会烧尽那些本可造福人类的知识萌芽。享受你的胜利吧，审判官。我的遗产已经被毁。但你休想从我口中听到一丝忏悔，因为真理站在我这一边。”
languages.original_text: "Diodas, like a spawn of the abyss have you poisoned my daughter's mind! You cloak yourself in His name, but you go against His covenants. Fools like you only burn away the shoots of knowledge that could serve the good of Humanity. Revel in your triumph, Inquisitor: my legacy is destroyed. But you will hear no contrition from me, for the truth is on my side."

traits.locale_text: “狄奥达斯，你这个深渊孽种，竟然毒害我女儿的思想！你用着祂的名义，却违背祂的圣约。你这等蠢货，只会烧尽那些本可造福人类的知识萌芽。享受你的胜利吧，审判官。我的遗产已经被毁。但你休想从我口中听到一丝忏悔，因为真理站在我这一边。”

languages.text: «¡Diodas, ha emponzoñado la mente de mi hija cual engendro del abismo! Se ampara bajo Su nombre, pero actúa en contra de Sus preceptos. Los necios como usted no hacen más que podar los brotes de un conocimiento que podría beneficiar a la Humanidad. Disfrute de su triunfo, inquisidor: mi legado ha sido destruido. Pero no espere que me arrepienta, pues la verdad está de mi parte».
languages.original_text: "Diodas, like a spawn of the abyss have you poisoned my daughter's mind! You cloak yourself in His name, but you go against His covenants. Fools like you only burn away the shoots of knowledge that could serve the good of Humanity. Revel in your triumph, Inquisitor: my legacy is destroyed. But you will hear no contrition from me, for the truth is on my side."

Pero no espere que me arrepienta, pues la verdad está de mi parte».

languages.text: « Diodas, tel un rejeton des abysses, vous avez empoisonné l'esprit de ma fille ! Vous vous cachez derrière Son nom, mais vous foulez au pied Ses préceptes. Les imbéciles de votre acabit passent leur vie à effacer les bribes de savoir qui pourraient faire le bien de l'humanité. Savourez votre triomphe, inquisiteur : mon héritage a été réduit à néant. Vous n'aurez cependant droit à aucun repentir de ma part, car j'ai la vérité de mon côté. »
languages.original_text: "Diodas, like a spawn of the abyss have you poisoned my daughter's mind! You cloak yourself in His name, but you go against His covenants. Fools like you only burn away the shoots of knowledge that could serve the good of Humanity. Revel in your triumph, Inquisitor: my legacy is destroyed. But you will hear no contrition from me, for the truth is on my side."

languages.text: "Diodas, Ihr habt den Verstand meiner Tochter wie eine Ausgeburt des Abyss vergiftet. Ihr schmückt Euch mit Seinem Namen, aber verstoßt gegen Seine Gebote. Narren wie Ihr brennen das aufkeimende Wissen nieder, das dem Wohl der Menschheit dienen könnte. Genießt Euren Triumph, Inquisitor: Mein Vermächtnis ist zerstört. Aber Ihr werdet keine Reue von mir hören, denn die Wahrheit ist auf meiner Seite."
languages.original_text: "Diodas, like a spawn of the abyss have you poisoned my daughter's mind! You cloak yourself in His name, but you go against His covenants. Fools like you only burn away the shoots of knowledge that could serve the good of Humanity. Revel in your triumph, Inquisitor: my legacy is destroyed. But you will hear no contrition from me, for the truth is on my side."

traits.locale_text: "Diodas, Ihr habt den Verstand meiner Tochter wie eine Ausgeburt des Abyss vergiftet. Ihr schmückt Euch mit Seinem Namen, aber verstoßt gegen Seine Gebote. Aber Ihr werdet keine Reue von mir hören, denn die Wahrheit ist auf meiner Seite."

languages.text: "Diodas, dipsizliğin dölü gibi kızımın zihnini zehirledin! O'nun adını zikrediyorsun ama O'nun ahitlerine karşı geliyorsun. Senin gibi aptallar ancak İnsanlığın iyiliğine hizmet edebilecek irfan filizlerini yakıp yok eder. Zaferinle övün Engizisyoncu... Mirasım yok edildi. Fakat benden hiçbir pişmanlık sözü duymayacaksın, zira gerçek benim tarafımda."
languages.original_text: "Diodas, like a spawn of the abyss have you poisoned my daughter's mind! You cloak yourself in His name, but you go against His covenants. Fools like you only burn away the shoots of knowledge that could serve the good of Humanity. Revel in your triumph, Inquisitor: my legacy is destroyed. But you will hear no contrition from me, for the truth is on my side."

Senin gibi aptallar ancak İnsanlığın iyiliğine hizmet edebilecek irfan filizlerini yakıp yok eder. Zaferinle övün Engizisyoncu... Mirasım yok edildi. Fakat benden hiçbir pişmanlık sözü duymayacaksın, zira gerçek benim tarafımda."

languages.text: 「ディオダス、深淵の産物のごとく、我が娘の心を毒づいた！汝は神の御名に身を包み、神の契約に背く！愚かな汝らは、人類の善のために役立つ知識の芽を焼き尽くすのみだ。汝の勝利に酔え、検閲官：我が遺産は破壊された。しかし、汝は我が悔恨を聞くことはないだろう。真実はこの側に在る。」
languages.original_text: "Diodas, like a spawn of the abyss have you poisoned my daughter's mind! You cloak yourself in His name, but you go against His covenants. Fools like you only burn away the shoots of knowledge that could serve the good of Humanity. Revel in your triumph, Inquisitor: my legacy is destroyed. But you will hear no contrition from me, for the truth is on my side."

traits.locale_text: 「ディオダス、深淵の産物のごとく、我が娘の心を毒づいた！汝は神の御名に身を包み、神の契約に背く！愚かな汝らは、人類の善のために役立つ知識の芽を焼き尽くすのみだ。汝の勝利に酔え、検閲官：我が遺産は破壊された。しかし、汝は我が悔恨を聞くことはないだろう。真実はこの側に在る。」
